account.hubDescription: Sign in to manage saved items and inquiries, or create an account to get started.
account.registerDescription: A few quick steps to set up your profile and sign in.
account.sectionContactHint: How we can reach you about bookings and inquiries.
account.sectionAddressHint: Used for deliveries and travel documents when needed.
account.sectionAccountHint: Choose a strong password to protect your account.
account.adminSeparateNotice: You are signed in as an administrator. Customer accounts are separate from the admin panel.
account.adminUseAdminLogin: This login is for customers only. Please use the admin login at /admin/login.
account.marketingOptIn: Send me updates and offers by email
account.registerSignInFailed: Account created but sign-in failed. Please sign in manually.
account.forgotPasswordDescription: Enter your email and we will send you a link to reset your password.
account.forgotPasswordSuccess: If an account exists for that email, you will receive password reset instructions shortly.
account.forgotPasswordError: Could not process your request. Try again later.
account.resetPasswordDescription: Enter a new password for your account.
account.resetPasswordError: Could not reset password. Request a new link.
account.resetTokenMissing: This reset link is invalid or missing. Request a new one.
